title: Lycianthes quichensis
taxonomy: Lycianthes quichensis is a species within the family Solanaceae. This family consists of plants commonly known as the nightshade or potato family. The Solanaceae family includes a wide variety of plants, such as tomatoes, potatoes, and eggplants. Lycianthes quichensis is further classified within the genus Lycianthes, which is part of the tribe Solaneae. The species Lycianthes quichensis is native to the Andean region of South America.
